message:
fix(bulkhead): release permit on panic to prevent capacity leaks

Wraps bulkhead-protected operations in catch_unwind to ensure permits
are always released, even if the operation panics. Previously, a
panicking operation would leave the permit unreleased, permanently
reducing the bulkhead's capacity.

Changes:
- Wrap op() in std::panic::catch_unwind with AssertUnwindSafe
- Release permit after catching potential panic
- Resume unwinding after permit release to preserve panic semantics
- Add test verifying permit release on panic

This is critical for long-running services where occasional panics
should not degrade system capacity over time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
